{{CargoRelic
|name=Rockery Inkstone
|class_id=20440
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This inkstone resembles a mountain, with a surface rimmed by twelve "peaks" of different heights. On the upper edge of the main peak on the front end is an oval carved water bowl. Of the three boulder-like feet, the front two are slightly higher than the rear, and the annular grooves at the bottom of the peaks on both sides seem to be a water reservoir. On the top of the three legs and the front of the main peak is a half-squatting hulk with a high forehead and prominent muscles, particularly eye-catching.
[Basic Info]
Height: 12.5cm. Circumference: 61cm. Surface Diameter: 13.5cm.
|fame=31
|art=12
|fth=16
|civ=14
|tech=17
|ss1=Per Novice Scroll opened, Snail DEF +1<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 100/100
|ss2=Per Novice Scroll opened, Snail DEF +2<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 100/100
|ss3=Per Novice Scroll opened, Snail DEF +3<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 100/100
|ss4=Per Novice Scroll opened, Snail DEF +3<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 100/100
|ss7=Per Novice Scroll opened, Snail DEF +3<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
